hero.title: Boost your potential, connect your success with IRIS JE

services.title: Our Expertise at the Service of Your Ambitions
services.description: IRIS Junior Création supports entrepreneurs, startups, SMEs, and public institutions through innovative solutions tailored to their needs. Leveraging its expertise in IT, studies, and marketing, the organization provides services ranging from digital solution development and strategic studies to brand enhancement and digital presence management.

about.title: Who Are We?
about.description_1: Founded in 2014 at the National Engineering School of Sfax (ENIS), IRIS Junior Création is a student association operating according to the consulting firm model. Through its various areas of expertise, it puts the skills of its members at the service of real-world projects and provides innovative solutions tailored to the needs of its clients.
about.description_2: Driven by the values of professionalism, innovation, and commitment, IRIS Junior Création strives to train tomorrow's engineers while contributing to the success of its clients and partners.

devis.title: Bring Your Project to Life
devis.description_1: Do you have an idea, a need, or a challenge to overcome? Our team is ready to provide solutions tailored to your objectives.
devis.description_2: Describe your project and receive a personalized quote. Together, let's turn your ideas into concrete achievements.

contact.title: Let's Stay Connected
contact.description_1: Do you have a question, need more information, or wish to bring a project to life? Feel free to contact us.
contact.description_2: Our team will be delighted to assist you and respond to your needs as quickly as possible.
contact.description_3: Let's build your next success together.

services.title: Customized services
services.description: Discover our IT, Marketing and Studies services to support your project.

it.title: IT Development & Digital Solutions
it.description: We create custom websites, mobile apps and chatbots to meet your technological needs.

etudes.title: Studies and strategic consulting
etudes.description: We carry out market studies, awareness studies, satisfaction surveys and business plans.

branding.title: Branding & Community Management
branding.description: Strengthen your brand image with our branding and community management services.

partenariat.title: Partnership & Sponsorship
partenariat.description: Support IRIS Junior Entreprise and benefit from unique visibility among students and professionals.

recrutement.title: Join IRIS Junior Entreprise
recrutement.description: Join our team of consultants and develop your technical and human skills.

hero.title: Our <accent>Services</accent>
hero.description: Discover our services in IT, Marketing and Studies. We put our expertise at the service of your projects.

introduction.title: Our Service Offer
introduction.description: IRIS Junior Entreprise operates as a consulting firm. We put our expertise at the service of entrepreneurs, SMEs and large accounts. Three areas of expertise to meet your needs.

it.title: IT
it.subtitle: Custom digital solutions to meet your technological needs.

web.title: Web Development
web.desc: Creation of custom websites or using content management systems. We use HTML/CSS/JavaScript for showcase sites and React JS and FastAPI frameworks for dynamic sites, as well as WordPress with its plugins for a turnkey solution.

mobile.title: Mobile Development
mobile.desc: Design of native mobile applications for Android with Dart and Android Studio, or hybrid cross-platform with the Flutter framework.

chatbot.title: Chatbot Creation
chatbot.desc: Design of intelligent chatbots with Dialogflow (Google). Integration on websites, mobile applications and social platforms like Facebook.

marketing.title: Marketing
marketing.subtitle: Strengthen your brand image and your presence on social networks.

branding.title: Branding
branding.desc: Creation of a complete graphic charter defining colors, typographies, logotype and layout rules. Design of custom logotypes for a strong and consistent visual identity on all your media (web and print).

community.title: Community Management
community.desc: Animation and engagement of your community on social networks. Content planning, visual creation, thematic monitoring and interaction with your subscribers to strengthen your visibility.

etudes.title: Studies
etudes.subtitle: Strategic studies to inform your decisions and optimize your development.

marche.title: Market Study
marche.desc: Collection and analysis of information to identify the characteristics of a market. Assessment of demand, analysis of competition, products, environment and trends. Use of PESTEL and SWOT methods.

notoriete.title: Awareness Study
notoriete.desc: Measurement of your brand awareness among consumers. Evaluation of spontaneous, assisted and overall perception of your company, its products and services.

satisfaction.title: Satisfaction Study
satisfaction.desc: Measurement of your customers' satisfaction level. Collection of feedback to improve your products, services and customer relationship. Identification of your strengths and areas for improvement.

business.title: Business Plan
business.desc: Development of a complete business plan for your creation or development project. Structuring of the economic model with the Business Model Canvas, financial forecasts and commercial strategy. Intended for investors and financial institutions.

cta.title: Do you have a project?
cta.description: Contact us to discuss your needs and get a personalized quote.

AboutPage.metaDescription: Discover IRIS Junior Entreprise, the Junior-Creation of ENIS. Our mission, vision, values and team.

hero.title: About IRIS JE
hero.description: Discover who we are, our mission and the values that drive us every day.

who_we_are.title: Who are we?
who_we_are.description_1: IRIS Junior Création is a student association founded in 2014 within the National School of Engineers of Sfax (ENIS). Operating according to the consulting firm model, it puts the skills of its members at the service of real projects through competitive and professional services.
who_we_are.description_2: As a non-profit organization, IRIS Junior Création has a dual vocation:
who_we_are.vocation_pedagogique_desc: Develop the technical, strategic and human skills of students.
who_we_are.vocation_economique_desc: Offer concrete and quality solutions to its clients and partners.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.quote: « Train students capable of evolving in a professional environment while offering high value-added services. »
mission.description: Through its projects, the association develops the skills of its consultants, promotes innovation, strengthens the spirit of initiative and supports its clients in their development.

vision.title: Our vision
vision.description_1: IRIS Junior Création aims to become a national reference for professionalism, innovation and impact, by achieving the « Next Level » through structured governance, a clear strategy and a high-performance management system.
vision.description_2: Through a progressive and consistent evolution of the entity, based on its human values, its quality requirements and its collective commitment, IRIS Junior Création wishes to build a mature, reliable and recognized organization within the Junior-Enterprise movement.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.desc: We encourage new ideas, creative solutions and the ability to anticipate needs.

resourcefulness.title: Resourcefulness
resourcefulness.desc: We know how to make the most of available resources and turn every challenge into an opportunity.

inspiration.title: Inspiration
inspiration.desc: We want to motivate, transmit and create a positive impact around us.

strategy.title: Strategy
strategy.desc: We encourage new ideas, creative solutions and the ability to anticipate needs.

professionalism.title: Professionalism
professionalism.desc: We value rigor, quality, reliability and respect for our commitments.

engagement.title: Commitment
engagement.desc: We move forward with involvement, responsibility and team spirit in every project.

PolitiqueConfidentialitePage.metaDescription: Privacy policy of the IRIS Junior Entreprise website - Personal data protection.

hero.title: Privacy policy
hero.description: How IRIS Junior Entreprise protects your personal data.

engagement.title: Privacy Commitment
engagement.desc: IRIS Junior Création places particular importance on the protection of its users' personal data.

collecte.title: Data Collected
collecte.desc: Information collected via the site's forms (first name, last name, email address, phone number, information about projects or requests made) is used exclusively for processing contact, quote and application requests.

acces.title: Access and Sharing
acces.desc: Collected data is accessible only to authorized members of IRIS Junior Création and is neither sold nor transferred to third parties without prior authorization.

conservation.title: Retention Period
conservation.desc: Data is retained for the time necessary to process requests and in compliance with applicable legal obligations.

droits.title: Your Rights
droits.desc: In accordance with current regulations, any user has the right to access, rectify, delete and object to their personal data. Any request can be addressed to IRIS Junior Création via the contact details provided on the site.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.desc: The site may also use cookies necessary for its proper functioning and to improve the user experience.

FAQPage.metaDescription: Frequently asked questions about IRIS Junior Entreprise: services, recruitment, quotes, operations and more.

hero.title: Frequently Asked Questions
hero.description: Find answers to the most frequently asked questions about IRIS Junior Entreprise, our services, recruitment and our offerings.

FaqAccordion.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FaqAccordion.subtitle: Quickly find answers to the most asked questions about IRIS Junior Entreprise.

items.question: What is IRIS Junior Entreprise?
items.answer: IRIS Junior Création is a student association founded in 2014 within the National School of Engineers of Sfax (ENIS). It operates as a consulting firm and offers services in IT, marketing and strategic studies.

items.question: What services do you offer?
items.answer:
We offer services in three main areas:
• IT: Web development, mobile development, chatbot creation.
• Marketing: Branding (graphic charter, logotype), community management.
• Studies: Market studies, awareness studies, satisfaction studies, business plans.

items.question: How can I request a quote?
items.answer: You can request a quote by filling out the dedicated form on our "Quote" page. Just describe your project, specify the type of service you want, your estimated budget and the desired deadline. Our team will contact you as soon as possible.

items.question: How can I join IRIS Junior Entreprise?
items.answer: Applications are open every year in October. You can apply via the recruitment form available on our site during this period. We are looking for motivated, passionate students who want to develop their skills.

items.question: What are the prerequisites to apply?
items.answer: Prerequisites vary depending on the department you are targeting. We generally look for ENIS students (all levels) with strong motivation, team spirit and a desire to learn. Technical skills are a plus but not mandatory for all positions.

items.question: What is a Junior-Enterprise?
items.answer: A Junior-Enterprise is a non-profit student association that offers consulting and services to companies, startups and individuals. The Junior-Enterprise movement has existed since 1967 and has thousands of student consultants around the world.

items.question: Are my personal data protected?
items.answer: Yes, we attach particular importance to the protection of your personal data. The information collected via our forms is used exclusively for processing your requests and is neither sold nor transferred to third parties without your prior consent. See our privacy policy for more details.

items.question: How can I contact IRIS Junior Entreprise?
items.answer: You can contact us via our "Contact" page by filling out the online form, by email at contact@irisje.tn or by phone at (+216) 96 822 343. We will reply as soon as possible.

items.question: Do you offer mobile development services?
items.answer: Yes, we develop native mobile applications for Android (with Dart and Android Studio) and hybrid cross-platform applications with the Flutter framework. We can also integrate features like push notifications, in-app payments and cloud synchronization.

items.question: What is a brand awareness study?
items.answer: A brand awareness study measures the level of knowledge of a brand, product or service among a target audience. It evaluates spontaneous awareness (knowledge without assistance), assisted awareness (recognition with clues) and the overall perception of the brand.

items.question: Can I follow IRIS Junior Entreprise news?
items.answer: Yes, you can follow us on our social networks (Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, TikTok and GitHub) where we regularly share our news, events and achievements. A news section is also under development on our site.

items.question: Do you offer community management services?
items.answer: Yes, we offer community management services including managing your social media, creating content (visuals, videos), planning posts, interacting with your community and analyzing performance.

Portfolio.title: Our achievements
Portfolio.subtitle: Discover some of the projects carried out by our consultants.
